requirement_topic.en: Transport Safety — UN 38.3, IMDG Sea Freight and ADR Class 9 to Morocco
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全——UN 38.3、IMDG海运及运往摩洛哥的ADR第9类
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全——UN 38.3、IMDG海運及運往摩洛哥的ADR第9類

summary.en: Lithium batteries (cells, packs, power banks) are dangerous goods for transport. A valid UN 38.3 test report (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3) is required for all modes before shipment regardless of destination — this applies identically for Morocco. Most exports to Morocco move by sea to Casablanca or Tanger Med under the IMDG Code (lithium-ion cells UN 3480; batteries in/with equipment UN 3481), with proper Class 9 packaging, marking, and a dangerous-goods declaration. Air freight into Morocco follows IATA DGR / ICAO Technical Instructions, including the state-of-charge limit (maximum 30% for loose lithium-ion cells/batteries shipped as cargo). Onward road movement within Morocco follows ADR-aligned rules (Morocco applies ADR-based road dangerous-goods requirements), so packages must carry UN 3480/3481 Class 9 markings and the transport document must follow ADR Chapter 5.4 conventions.
summary.zh: 锂电池（电芯、电池组、移动电源）属运输危险货物。无论目的地，所有运输方式在发货前均须持有有效UN 38.3测试报告（联合国危险货物运输试验和标准手册第三部分第38.3节）——对摩洛哥同样适用。多数对摩洛哥出口经海运至卡萨布兰卡或丹吉尔地中海港，依IMDG规则（锂离子电芯UN 3480；装入/随附设备的电池UN 3481），须有适当第9类包装、标识及危险品申报。空运至摩洛哥遵循IATA DGR/ICAO技术细则，包括荷电状态限制（散装锂离子电芯/电池作为货物运输最高30%）。摩洛哥境内后续道路运输遵循对标ADR的规则（摩洛哥实施基于ADR的道路危险货物要求），故包装须粘贴UN 3480/3481第9类标识，运输文件须遵循ADR第5.4章惯例。
summary.zht: 鋰電池（電芯、電池組、行動電源）屬運輸危險貨物。無論目的地，所有運輸方式在發貨前均須持有有效UN 38.3測試報告（聯合國危險品運輸試驗和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節）——對摩洛哥同樣適用。多數對摩洛哥出口經海運至卡薩布蘭卡或丹吉爾地中海港，依IMDG規則（鋰離子電芯UN 3480；裝入/隨附設備的電池UN 3481），須有適當第9類包裝、標識及危險品申報。空運至摩洛哥遵循IATA DGR/ICAO技術細則，包括荷電狀態限制（散裝鋰離子電芯/電池作為貨物運輸最高30%）。摩洛哥境內後續道路運輸遵循對標ADR的規則（摩洛哥實施基於ADR的道路危險品要求），故包裝須粘貼UN 3480/3481第9類標識，運輸文件須遵循ADR第5.4章慣例。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — Lithium Metal and Lithium-Ion Batteries (UN 38.3)
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code), current edition — Class 9, UN 3480 / UN 3481 — primary mode for sea freight to Casablanca / Tanger Med
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) / ICAO Technical Instructions (Doc 9284) — air freight, state-of-charge limits
ADR-aligned Moroccan road dangerous-goods rules — Class 9, UN 3480 / UN 3481 (Morocco is an ADR contracting party)

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 test reports for all lithium batteries transported by air, consistent with ICAO and CAAC requirements, and for sea freight under the IMDG Code (which applies globally and identically for shipments leaving Chinese ports). Domestic road transport uses GB 12268 (Dangerous Goods List) and JT/T 617. Chinese exporters shipping lithium batteries internationally already typically hold UN 38.3 reports and use IMDG for sea freight, so the transport baseline for export to Morocco is largely the same paperwork already produced for any sea/air export. The Morocco-specific additions are minor and operational rather than a new test.
summary.zh: 中国要求所有空运锂电池持有UN 38.3测试报告，符合ICAO及CAAC要求，海运须依全球统一适用的IMDG规则（对离开中国港口的货物同样适用）。国内道路运输采用GB 12268（危险货物品名表）和JT/T 617。中国出口商在国际运输锂电池时通常已持有UN 38.3报告并使用IMDG海运，故对摩洛哥出口的运输基线与任何海/空运出口所需文件基本相同。摩洛哥特有的增加项较小且属操作层面，而非新的测试。
summary.zht: 中國要求所有空運鋰電池持有UN 38.3測試報告，符合ICAO及CAAC要求，海運須依全球統一適用的IMDG規則（對離開中國港口的貨物同樣適用）。國內道路運輸採用GB 12268（危險貨物品名表）和JT/T 617。中國出口商在國際運輸鋰電池時通常已持有UN 38.3報告並使用IMDG海運，故對摩洛哥出口的運輸基線與任何海/空運出口所需文件基本相同。摩洛哥特有的增加項較小且屬操作層面，而非新的測試。

standards_or_laws: GB 12268-2012 — List of dangerous goods (SAC/SAMR) — domestic road transport classification
JT/T 617-2018 — Road transport of dangerous goods — requirements (Ministry of Transport, PRC)
CAAC Order No. 55 — Provisions on the Transport of Dangerous Goods by Civil Aviation (CAAC)

gap.en: UN 38.3 is a universal requirement and most Chinese exporters already hold it, so the transport gap for Morocco is small and almost entirely operational. Practical points: (1) sea freight to Casablanca/Tanger Med under IMDG must use correct Class 9 UN 3480/3481 packaging, marking, and a dangerous-goods declaration acceptable to the carrier and Moroccan port authorities; (2) air freight must observe the IATA DGR 30% state-of-charge limit for loose cells/batteries; (3) onward road haulage inside Morocco follows ADR-aligned documentation (transport document per ADR 5.4, package marking per ADR 5.2), so the consignee/importer should be able to handle Class 9 goods. Exporters should confirm the UN 38.3 report is from an accredited laboratory and covers the exact cell/pack configuration shipped.
gap.zh: UN 38.3为全球性要求，大多数中国出口商已持有，故对摩洛哥的运输差距较小且几乎完全属操作层面。实务要点：（1）经IMDG海运至卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔地中海港须使用正确的第9类UN 3480/3481包装、标识及承运人和摩洛哥港口当局可接受的危险品申报；（2）空运须遵守IATA DGR对散装电芯/电池的30%荷电状态限制；（3）摩洛哥境内后续公路运输遵循对标ADR的文件（运输文件依ADR 5.4，包装标识依ADR 5.2），故收货人/进口商应能处理第9类货物。出口商应确认UN 38.3报告来自认可实验室且涵盖所运具体电芯/电池组配置。
gap.zht: UN 38.3為全球性要求，大多數中國出口商已持有，故對摩洛哥的運輸差距較小且幾乎完全屬操作層面。實務要點：（1）經IMDG海運至卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾地中海港須使用正確的第9類UN 3480/3481包裝、標識及承運人和摩洛哥港口當局可接受的危險品申報；（2）空運須遵守IATA DGR對散裝電芯/電池的30%荷電狀態限制；（3）摩洛哥境內後續公路運輸遵循對標ADR的文件（運輸文件依ADR 5.4，包裝標識依ADR 5.2），故收貨人/進口商應能處理第9類貨物。出口商應確認UN 38.3報告來自認可實驗室且涵蓋所運具體電芯/電池組配置。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 test report required for all transport modes; IMDG Code Class 9 compliance for sea freight to Casablanca/Tanger Med; IATA DGR state-of-charge limits for air cargo; ADR-aligned documentation for onward road transport within Morocco
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — UN 38.3 required by CAAC for air transport; IMDG Code for sea transport; GB 12268 / JT/T 617 for domestic road transport

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — ADR dangerous goods by road (Morocco is a contracting party)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 testing is a universal transport requirement that Chinese exporters typically already meet, so the Morocco transport gap is small and operational. Sea freight to Casablanca/Tanger Med uses the IMDG Code (Class 9, UN 3480/3481), air freight follows IATA DGR state-of-charge limits, and onward road transport in Morocco follows ADR-aligned documentation. The exporter should confirm the UN 38.3 report is accredited and matches the shipped configuration, and ensure the in-country importer can handle Class 9 dangerous goods.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3测试为全球性运输要求，中国出口商通常已满足，故摩洛哥运输差距较小且属操作层面。海运至卡萨布兰卡/丹吉尔地中海港使用IMDG规则（第9类，UN 3480/3481），空运遵循IATA DGR荷电状态限制，摩洛哥境内后续道路运输遵循对标ADR的文件。出口商应确认UN 38.3报告经认可且与所运配置一致，并确保当地进口商能处理第9类危险货物。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3測試為全球性運輸要求，中國出口商通常已滿足，故摩洛哥運輸差距較小且屬操作層面。海運至卡薩布蘭卡/丹吉爾地中海港使用IMDG規則（第9類，UN 3480/3481），空運遵循IATA DGR荷電狀態限制，摩洛哥境內後續道路運輸遵循對標ADR的文件。出口商應確認UN 38.3報告經認可且與所運配置一致，並確保當地進口商能處理第9類危險貨物。
